Name of Coal Mine/ Name of Prior Allottee State where Coal Mine/Block Located No. Block 60 & 61 Gidhmuri & Paturia (to Chattishgarh State Electricity Chhattisgarh be mined together) Board 62 Banhardih Jharkhand State Electricity Jharkhand Board 63 Kasta (East) Damodar Valley Corporation West Bengal 64 Mara II Mahan NCT of Delhi, Haryana Power Madhya Generation Corp. Ltd. Pradesh 65 Rajbar E & D Tenughat Vidyut Nigam Limited Jharkhand 66 Gare Pelma, Sector -I Chhattisgarh Mineral Chhattisgarh Development Corporation Limited 67 Saharpur Jamarpani Damodar Valley Corporation Jharkhand 68 Naini Gujrat Mineral Development Orissa Corpora tion, Pondichery Industrial Promotion Development and Investment Corporation Limited [F. No. 13016/9/2014-CA-III] VIVEK BHARADWAJ, Jt. Secy.
